SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HELD ON OCT-07-2004 IN 306, RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL - JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RICARDO COLOMBANA AND AGAINST REMI TAN IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,190.68. JUDGE KEVIN M. MCCARTHY; CLERK MARILYN L. FLORES
